title: <div>   * Input: Current rent, lease start date, property address (to check &quo
content:
* Input: Current rent, lease start date, property address (to check "Small Landlord" exemptions via public tax records).
* Feature: Auto-calculates the maximum "reasonable" rent increase using the live HCR inflation rate (e.g., 3.79% + 5% = 8.79% for 2025).
* Output: Generates the legally required PDF notice (State Form) ready for e-signature.
* Why it wins: It automates a legal requirement that carries high liability if messed up.
B. The "Lead-Safe" Lifecycle Manager (NJ Focus)
* The Problem: NJ law requires lead paint inspections for rentals every tenant turnover or every three years. Agents managing rentals often miss these deadlines, blocking the Certificate of Occupancy.
* The MVP Solution: An automated "Inspection Watchdog."
* Feature: Tracks the "Lead-Safe Certificate" expiration date for every unit in an agent's portfolio.
* Feature: Auto-schedules inspections with approved vendors (e.g., Lew Environmental integration) 60 days before expiration.
* Feature: Digital storage for the specific "Lead-Safe" certificate required for municipal filings.
